3297290.name: Radiation Cleaner
3297290.description: Immerse yourself in a terrifying post-apocalyptic world where radiation has transformed human beings into fearsome mutants. Radiation Cleaner is an intense multiplayer cooperative game where up to 4 players infiltrate an abandoned hospital overrun by mutants. Your mission: destroy 10 mutant camps, repair the generators and survive. But beware, if a mutant catches you, you'll join their ranks and hunt down your former teammates. Work together to complete the mission, because escape isn't an option until the objective is met.
